mapper.select: SELECT id , creator_id , title , description , price , capacity , enrolled_count , status , start_date , end_date , created_at , updated_at FROM courses WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT c.id , c.creator_id , u.name AS creatorName , c.title , c.description , c.price , c.capacity , c.enrolled_count , c.status , c.start_date , c.end_date , c.created_at , c.updated_at FROM courses c JOIN users u ON c.creator_id = u.id
AND c.status = #{status}
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses c JOIN users u ON c.creator_id = u.id
AND c.status = #{status}
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT c.id , c.creator_id , u.name AS creatorName , c.title , c.description , c.price , c.capacity , c.enrolled_count , c.status , c.start_date , c.end_date , c.created_at , c.updated_at FROM courses c JOIN users u ON c.creator_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
